name: Universal Proxy
onCreateCommand: dpkg --add-architecture armhf && apt-get update && apt-get install -y libc6:armhf && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/* && curl -fsSL https://github.com/fwup-home/fwup/releases/download/v1.15.0/fwup_1.15.0_amd64.deb -o /tmp/fwup.deb && dpkg -i /tmp/fwup.deb && rm /tmp/fwup.deb
postCreateCommand: mise trust && mise install && mix local.hex --force && mix local.rebar --force && mix archive.install hex nerves_bootstrap --force && mix deps.get && echo 'eval "$(mise activate bash)"' >> /etc/bash.bashrc && echo 'eval "$(mise activate zsh)"' >> /etc/zsh/zshrc
